name: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast. Light and airy with a hint of vanilla.
instructions: Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl
Whisk wet ingredients in a separate bowl
Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed
Heat a griddle over medium heat and grease lightly
Pour 1/4 cup batter for each pancake
Cook until bubbles form on surface, then flip
Cook until golden brown on both sides
Serve hot with syrup and butter

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple yet delicious avocado toast with a perfect balance of flavors. A healthy breakfast option.
instructions: Toast bread slices until golden brown
Mash avocado in a bowl with lemon juice
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Spread avocado mixture on toasted bread
Drizzle with olive oil
Sprinkle red pepper flakes on top
Serve immediately

name: Caesar Salad
description: Classic Caesar salad with crispy romaine, parmesan, and homemade dressing.
instructions: Wash and dry romaine lettuce, then chop
Make dressing by blending garlic, anchovies, lemon juice, egg yolk, and dijon mustard
Slowly drizzle in olive oil while blending
Add worcestershire sauce and season to taste
Toss lettuce with dressing
Add croutons and shaved parmesan
Serve immediately

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: Perfectly crispy and golden grilled cheese sandwich with melted cheese inside.
instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice
Place cheese between bread slices with buttered sides out
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Place sandwich in skillet
Cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes
Flip and cook other side until golden and cheese is melted
Cut diagonally and serve hot

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Creamy Italian pasta dish with bacon, eggs, and parmesan cheese.
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions
While pasta cooks, fry bacon until crispy
Whisk eggs and parmesan together in a bowl
Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup pasta water
Add hot pasta to bacon in pan
Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture
Add pasta water if needed to create creamy sauce
Season with black pepper and serve immediately

name: Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and healthy stir fry with tender chicken and colorful vegetables.
instructions: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and coat with cornstarch
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat
Stir fry chicken until golden and cooked through, then remove
Add more oil and stir fry vegetables until tender-crisp
Add minced garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds
Return chicken to pan
Add soy sauce and sesame oil
Toss everything together and serve over rice

name: Salmon with Roasted Vegetables
description: Healthy and delicious baked salmon with perfectly roasted vegetables.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C)
Place salmon and vegetables on a baking sheet
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and herbs
Add minced garlic and lemon slices
Bake for 15-20 minutes until salmon is cooked through
Vegetables should be tender and slightly caramelized
Squeeze fresh lemon over everything before serving

name: Hummus with Vegetables
description: Creamy homemade hummus served with fresh crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Drain and rinse chickpeas
Add chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and cumin to food processor
Blend until smooth, adding water if needed
Drizzle in olive oil while blending
Season with salt to taste
Transfer to serving bowl
Cut vegetables into sticks
Serve hummus with fresh vegetables

name: Energy Balls
description: No-bake energy balls packed with oats, dates, and nuts. Perfect healthy snack.
instructions: Add dates to food processor and pulse until broken down
Add oats, almonds, peanut butter, honey, vanilla, and salt
Pulse until mixture comes together
Stir in chocolate chips by hand
Roll mixture into small balls
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes
Store in refrigerator for up to 2 weeks

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
description: Layered parfait with Greek yogurt, granola, and fresh berries.
instructions: Layer Greek yogurt in a glass or bowl
Add a layer of granola
Add fresh berries
Repeat layers
Drizzle with honey on top
Serve immediately for crunchy granola
Can be prepared ahead without granola and added just before serving

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil.
instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C)
Roll out pizza dough on a floured surface
Spread tomato sauce evenly over dough
Add sliced mozzarella cheese
Drizzle with olive oil
Bake for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden
Add fresh basil leaves
Slice and serve hot

name: Chicken Tacos
description: Flavorful chicken tacos with fresh toppings and homemade salsa.
instructions: Season chicken with taco seasoning
Cook chicken in a skillet until done, then slice
Warm tortillas in a dry pan
Chop lettuce and tomatoes
Assemble tacos with chicken and toppings
Add cheese, sour cream, and cilantro
Squeeze lime juice over tacos
Serve immediately

name: Smoothie Bowl
description: Thick and creamy smoothie bowl topped with fresh fruit and granola.
instructions: Blend frozen banana, berries, yogurt, and almond milk until thick
Pour into a bowl
Top with fresh berries
Add granola for crunch
Sprinkle with chia seeds
Drizzle with honey
Serve immediately

name: Beef Burger
description: Juicy homemade beef burger with all the classic toppings.
instructions: Form ground beef into patties and season with salt and pepper
Heat grill or skillet to high heat
Cook burgers for 4-5 minutes per side
Add cheese in the last minute if desired
Toast burger buns
Assemble burgers with lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles
Add ketchup and mustard
Serve hot with fries

name: Vegetable Soup
description: Hearty and healthy vegetable soup packed with nutrients.
instructions: Chop all vegetables into bite-sized pieces
Sauté onion and garlic in a large pot
Add remaining vegetables and cook for 5 minutes
Pour in vegetable broth
Add herbs, salt, and pepper
Bring to a boil then simmer for 30 minutes
Adjust seasoning to taste
Serve hot with crusty bread
